## Describe your changes

[A clear and concise description of what this PR does.]

## Issue ticket number and link

Closes #[issue number]

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] My code follows the project's formatting and linting rules (`pre-commit run --all-files`).
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works.
- [ ] All tests pass successfully (`python -m pytest`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] The changes maintain the separation between agnostic core and domain-specific plugins.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Tooling / Refactoring

## Additional Context

[Any additional context, screenshots, or logs that might be helpful for the reviewer.]
